name: Praline Pumpkin-Date Bread
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Praline Streusel:
1/3 cup Packed brown sugar
1/3 cup Chopped pecans
1 tablespoon Margarine or butter, softened
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease the bottoms only of 2 loaf pans.
Prepare praline streusel by mixing ingredients until crumbly; set aside. Mix sugar, oil, vanilla, eggs, and pumpkin puree in a large bowl. Stir in remaining ingredients except dates. Stir in dates.
Pour batter into prepared pans. Sprinkle with praline streusel. Bake 50 to 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool for 10 minutes. Loosen sides of loaves from pans; remove from pans. Cool completely on wire racks before slicing.
